title: Papercut Resolver
lede: Turn customer feedback into shipped code. Highlight rough edges and review AI-drafted pull requests instantly.

sections.title: Incoming Feedback Triage
sections.description: Reported UX issues and their current AI resolution status.

sections.title: Review Proposed Change: Hover Colour Contrast
sections.body:
Current Behaviour: The 'Cancel' button uses a light grey text on a white background on hover, failing accessibility guidelines.

AI Proposed Fix: Update the hover state text colour to a darker grey (#4B5563) to meet WCAG AA contrast requirements. A pull request has been staged for the front-end repository. No structural changes were made to the component.

sections.title: Resolution Workflow
items: Review the plain-text description of the AI proposed fix.
Verify the visual difference matches the intended behaviour.
Approve the generated code changes to merge the automated PR.

demoSteps: Review the high-level metrics of resolved papercuts.
Scan the triage table for incoming UX issues reported by the support team.
Read the plain-text summary of the AI's proposed fix for the colour contrast issue.
Follow the resolution workflow steps to simulate approving the change.
notes: Ensure all user-facing copy uses UK spelling (e.g., colour, behaviour).
The V1 demo uses static fixture data to simulate the AI's proposed fixes; no live LLM or GitHub API calls are made.
The layout should emphasise readability for non-technical users, keeping actual code hidden behind the plain-English summaries.
